Node.title: Node
Node.description: A hierarchical node in the tree structure (folder or note).

parentId.description: The ID of the parent node, or null for root.

type.description: Whether the node is a folder or a note.

order.description: The display order of the node among its siblings.

content.description: The rich text content of the note (empty for folders).

ownerId.description: The UID of the user who owns this node.

updatedAt.description: When the node was last updated.
